issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' only if this is a manual ability. The text '[DON!! x1]' suggests a cost-based triggered ability that activates automatically when the condition is met during gameplay, not a manual activation. Should likely be 'Trigger' or clarify if this is meant to be manually activated.

Condition 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 checks if the player has 1 resting DON. The card text states 'If there is a Character with a cost of 0', which is a board state condition (HasCardOnBoard with cost filter), not a DON count condition. These are fundamentally different.

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. The gain of [Double Attack] should persist for the attack phase of this turn. Without explicit turn-end language in the card text, this should be 'Permanent' or 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: This Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects. [DON!! x1] If there is a Character with a cost of 0, this Character gains [Double Attack].
